pages.text: $(thing)Slings$() are charge-and-release ranged weapons. Basic slings fire loose rocks; reinforced slings add access to metal ammo types.
Forge $(thing)Metal Bracing$() first (wrought iron shown; steel also available).
Combine a sling and metal bracing to create a $(thing)Reinforced Sling$().
Forge heavy sling ammo on an anvil (wrought iron shown).
Convert heavy ammo into Scatter or High-Velocity variants.
Sparking ammo adds fire damage behavior on impact.

pages.title: Ammo Types
pages.text: $(li)$(thing)Heavy$(): direct damage$(li)$(thing)Scatter$(): multi-projectile spread$(li)$(thing)High-Velocity$(): flatter/faster trajectory$(li)$(thing)Sparking$(): ignites targets
